missing_policy: Retain null and one independent missing flag per feature; fit transforms inside training folds only.
financial_date_only_policy: No earlier than next trading day after ann_date/f_ann_date.
valuation_policy: Daily-basic source trade date is shifted conservatively to the next trading day when no exact timestamp exists.
market_state_policy: Build once from historical PIT CSI300 membership and reuse the same hash for all models/universes.
